attacking_style: Excels in opportunistic moves from early breakaways, capable of sustaining efforts through technical descents and finishing with explosive sprint power in small group finishes.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Technical descents combined with finishing climbs where bike handling skills and punch prove decisive; thrives in chaotic, reduced bunch scenarios requiring technical prowess.
vulnerability: Insufficient observations to identify repeated weaknesses, though high-risk descending style occasionally creates self-inflicted danger.
key_patterns: Combines breakaway endurance with sprint finish capability in reduced groups
Exceptional bike handling allows recovery from near-crashes without losing competitive position
Willing to take high risks on technical descents to gain/maintain advantages
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows winning form with technical skill, but insufficient data for trend analysis
